ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WADHWA, JYOTIKA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,450.00 FILED BY WADHWA, JYOTIKA AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC HEIGHTS TOWERS LLC NAZARI, HASMIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WADHWA, JYOTIKA AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC HEIGHTS TOWERS LLC
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WADHWA, JYOTIKA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2123.00 (WHICH INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. A SETTLEMENT WAS FOR RETURN OF SOME OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT HASMIK NASZARI IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT DOES NOT FIND DEFENDANT ACTED IN BAD FAITH. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEBRUARY 22, 2022, HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF JYOTIKA WADHWA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT PACIFIC HEIGHTS TOWERS, LLC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HASMIK NAZARI (PROPERTY MANAGER). PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
